subject: [DCAE] Revise to 4.4.2 CM container
commit_message:
[DCAE] Revise to 4.4.2 CM container

Updated K8Splugin 3.8.0 (container policy-lib fixfor base64 encoding in
py3)

Change-Id: I5b32e06520c03d2151b45707a55e5e20f0c50584
Signed-off-by: vv770d <vv770d@att.com>
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2671
